rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding to subcomponent ports or internal state.
Preserve AADL component type structure by not injecting implementation-specific references into type-level annexes.
generic_rules: Place contracts in the narrowest scope that has visibility of all referenced features.
Implementation-level bindings must not reference subcomponents or internal paths in type-level annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for all AGREE blocks.
Type-level contracts may only reference component features, not subcomponent ports.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing subcomponent ports or internal signals in component type annexes.
Do not mix implementation-specific bindings with type-level assumptions or guarantees.
